datasetAgreementGeneral: This dataset contains clinical diagnostic data collected from Sylhet Diabetes Hospital, Bangladesh. It is provided for academic and research use only.
term1: You acknowledge that this dataset is intended solely for diabetes diagnosis research and related academic purposes.
term2: You agree not to use this dataset for any commercial, non-research, or unauthorised purposes.
term3: You agree not to attempt re-identification of any individuals within the dataset.
term4: You must properly attribute the Sylhet Diabetes Hospital and original data contributors in all publications and presentations.
term5: You accept full responsibility for ensuring the ethical use of this dataset in compliance with all applicable institutional and governmental regulations.
